design_philosophy.visual_style: Minimalist Industrial - Clean lines, high legibility, status-forward
principles: Data Density vs. Clarity: High contrast for data, low contrast for structure.
State-Driven: Every item must show its status (Active, Idle, Damaged) instantly.
No Spreadsheet Vibes: Use cards, timelines, and visual indicators.

headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, Status labels

containers.main_wrapper: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 h-12 rounded-lg font-medium shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 h-12 rounded-lg font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 h-12 rounded-lg font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.stat_card: flex flex-col justify-between p-6 bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-xl

inputs.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium leading-none peer-disabled:cursor-not-allowed peer-disabled:opacity-70 mb-2 block text-slate-700

status_pills.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

icons.usage: Use icons heavily in Action Panel buttons to reduce reading time.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/60 sticky top-0 z-50

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic gradients. Use flat, clean surfaces with subtle borders.
Mobile-first is LAW. Test all layouts on 375px width logic mentally.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all uppercase headers. It saves horizontal space on mobile.
Events Log must look like a timeline, not just a spreadsheet table.
Action buttons should be large (h-14 or h-16) on the dashboard for easy touch access.
Forms: Use 'Drawer' components for complex selects on mobile instead of native dropdowns.
Implement the 'noise_texture' overlay on the body for a subtle tactile feel.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
